        except ValueError:
            barcode_index = 0
        barcode_combo.current(barcode_index)
        barcode_combo.grid(row=s_row, column=1, sticky="w", padx=5)
        def on_barcode_selected(event=None):
            selected = barcode_combo.get()
            self.app.barcode_type.set(self.app.find_key_for_value(selected, ["code_qr", "code_barcode"]))
        barcode_combo.bind("<<ComboboxSelected>>", on_barcode_selected)
        self.comboboxes['barcode_type'] = barcode_combo
        s_row += 1

        self.sep_lines_check = ttk.Checkbutton(split_settings_frame, text=translate("label_enable_sep_lines"), variable=self.app.enable_separation_lines)
        self.sep_lines_check.grid(row=s_row, column=0, columnspan=2, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((self.sep_lines_check, "label_enable_sep_lines"))
        _apply_direction(self.sep_lines_check)
        def update_separation_lines_state(*args):
            state = "disabled" if self.app.output_type.get() == "output_separate_files" else "normal"
            self.sep_lines_check.configure(state=state)
            if state == "disabled":
                self.app.enable_separation_lines.set(False)
        self.app.output_type.trace_add("write", update_separation_lines_state)
        update_separation_lines_state()
        s_row += 1

        check_start_line = ttk.Checkbutton(split_settings_frame, text=translate("label_enable_start_line"), variable=self.app.add_line_at_start)
        check_start_line.grid(row=s_row, column=0, columnspan=4, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((check_start_line, "label_enable_start_line"))
        _apply_direction(check_start_line)
        s_row += 1

        check_end_line = ttk.Checkbutton(split_settings_frame, text=translate("label_enable_end_line"), variable=self.app.add_line_at_end)
        check_end_line.grid(row=s_row, column=0, columnspan=4, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((check_end_line, "label_enable_end_line"))
        _apply_direction(check_end_line)
        s_row += 1

        check_border = ttk.Checkbutton(split_settings_frame, text=translate("label_draw_slice_border"), variable=self.app.draw_slice_border)
        check_border.grid(row=s_row, column=0, columnspan=4, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((check_border, "label_draw_slice_border"))
        _apply_direction(check_border)
        s_row += 1

        label_order = ttk.Label(split_settings_frame, text=translate("label_bryt_order"))
        label_order.grid(row=s_row, column=0, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((label_order, "label_bryt_order"))
        _apply_direction(label_order)
        order_values = [translate("bryt_order_1"), translate("bryt_order_2"), translate("bryt_order_3"), translate("bryt_order_4"), translate("bryt_order_5"), translate("bryt_order_6")]
        bryt_combo = ttk.Combobox(split_settings_frame, values=order_values, width=50, state="readonly")
        _apply_direction(bryt_combo)
        try:
            bryt_index = ["bryt_order_1", "bryt_order_2", "bryt_order_3", "bryt_order_4", "bryt_order_5", "bryt_order_6"].index(self.app.bryt_order.get())
        except ValueError:
            bryt_index = 0
        bryt_combo.current(bryt_index)
        bryt_combo.grid(row=s_row, column=1, columnspan=3, sticky="w", padx=5)
        def on_bryt_selected(event=None):
            selected = bryt_combo.get()
            self.app.bryt_order.set(self.app.find_key_for_value(selected, ["bryt_order_1", "bryt_order_2", "bryt_order_3", "bryt_order_4", "bryt_order_5", "bryt_order_6"]))
        bryt_combo.bind("<<ComboboxSelected>>", on_bryt_selected)
        self.comboboxes['bryt_order'] = bryt_combo
        s_row += 1

        label_rotation = ttk.Label(split_settings_frame, text=translate("label_slice_rotation"))
        label_rotation.grid(row=s_row, column=0, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((label_rotation, "label_slice_rotation"))
        _apply_direction(label_rotation)
        rotation_combo = ttk.Combobox(split_settings_frame, textvariable=self.app.slice_rotation, values=["0", "180"], width=5, state="readonly")
        rotation_combo.grid(row=s_row, column=1, sticky="w", padx=5)
        _apply_direction(rotation_combo)
        s_row += 1

        # Sekcja: Zarządzanie profilami
        profile_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(left_frame, text=translate("section_profiles"), padding="10")
        profile_frame.grid(row=row_counter, column=0, sticky="ew", padx=5, pady=5)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((profile_frame, "section_profiles"))
        _apply_direction(profile_frame)
        row_counter += 1
        profile_frame.columnconfigure(0, weight=1)
        self.app.profile_combo = ttk.Combobox(profile_frame, textvariable=self.app.profile_name_var, values=self.app.profile_list, width=30)
        self.app.profile_combo.grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="ew", padx=(0,5))
        _apply_direction(self.app.profile_combo)
        btn_load = ttk.Button(profile_frame, text=translate("button_load"), command=self.app.load_profile)
        btn_load.grid(row=0, column=1, padx=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((btn_load, "button_load"))
        _apply_direction(btn_load)
        btn_save = ttk.Button(profile_frame, text=translate("button_save"), command=self.app.save_profile)
        btn_save.grid(row=0, column=2, padx=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((btn_save, "button_save"))
        _apply_direction(btn_save)
        btn_delete = ttk.Button(profile_frame, text=translate("button_delete"), command=self.app.delete_profile)
        btn_delete.grid(row=0, column=3, padx=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((btn_delete, "button_delete"))
        _apply_direction(btn_delete)

        self.recent_profiles_container = ttk.Frame(profile_frame)
        self.recent_profiles_container.grid(row=1, column=0, columnspan=4, sticky="ew", pady=(10,0))
        for col in range(5):
            self.recent_profiles_container.columnconfigure(col, weight=1)
        self._create_recent_profile_buttons_simple(self.recent_profiles_container)

        # Sekcja: Lokalizacja zapisu
        loc_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(left_frame, text=translate("section_save_location"), padding="10")
        loc_frame.grid(row=row_counter, column=0, sticky="ew", padx=5, pady=5)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((loc_frame, "section_save_location"))
        _apply_direction(loc_frame)
        row_counter += 1
        loc_frame.columnconfigure(0, weight=1)
        entry_loc = ttk.Entry(loc_frame, textvariable=self.app.output_dir, width=60)
        entry_loc.grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="ew", padx=(0,5))
        _apply_direction(entry_loc)
        btn_browse_out = ttk.Button(loc_frame, text=translate("button_browse"), command=self.app.browse_output_dir)
        btn_browse_out.grid(row=0, column=1)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((btn_browse_out, "button_browse"))
        _apply_direction(btn_browse_out)

        check_create_folder = ttk.Checkbutton(loc_frame, text=translate("label_create_order_folder"), variable=self.app.create_order_folder)
        check_create_folder.grid(row=1, column=0, columnspan=2, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=(5,0))
        self.translatable_widgets.append((check_create_folder, "label_create_order_folder"))
        _apply_direction(check_create_folder)

        # Prawy panel – sekcje podglądu
        right_frame = ttk.Frame(main_container)
        right_frame.grid(row=0, column=1, sticky="nsew", padx=(10, 10), pady=10)
        right_frame.rowconfigure(0, weight=1)
        right_frame.rowconfigure(1, weight=1)
        right_frame.columnconfigure(0, weight=1)

        # Sekcja: Podgląd wejściowy
        preview_in_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(right_frame, text=" " + translate("section_input_preview") + " ", padding="10")
        preview_in_frame.grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="nsew", pady=(0, 5))
        self.translatable_widgets.append((preview_in_frame, "section_input_preview"))
        _apply_direction(preview_in_frame)
        preview_in_frame.rowconfigure(0, weight=1)
        preview_in_frame.columnconfigure(0, weight=1)

        self.preview_canvas = tk.Canvas(preview_in_frame, bg="lightgrey", highlightthickness=0)
        self.preview_canvas.grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="nsew")
        self.preview_progress = ttk.Progressbar(preview_in_frame, orient='horizontal', mode='indeterminate')
        self.preview_progress.grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="ew", padx=10, pady=10)


        # Sekcja: Podgląd wyjściowy
        preview_out_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(right_frame, text=" " + translate("section_output_preview") + " ", padding="10")
        preview_out_frame.grid(row=1, column=0, sticky="nsew", pady=(5, 0))
        self.translatable_widgets.append((preview_out_frame, "section_output_preview"))
        _apply_direction(preview_out_frame)
        preview_out_frame.rowconfigure(0, weight=1)
        preview_out_frame.columnconfigure(0, weight=1)

        self.output_preview_canvas = tk.Canvas(preview_out_frame, bg="lightgrey", highlightthickness=0)
        self.output_preview_canvas.grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="nsew")
        self.output_preview_progress = ttk.Progressbar(preview_out_frame, orient='horizontal', mode='indeterminate')
        self.output_preview_progress.grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="ew", padx=10, pady=10)

        # Inicjalizacja podglądów
        self.update_preview(manage_progress=False)
        self.update_output_preview(manage_progress=False)




    def _create_recent_profile_buttons_simple(self, container):
        """Tworzy przyciski szybkiego dostępu do ostatnio używanych profili."""
        for widget in container.winfo_children():
            widget.destroy()
        recent_profiles = self.app.profile_list[:5]
        row = 0
        col = 0
        for profile in recent_profiles:
            btn = ttk.Button(container, text=profile, command=lambda name=profile: self._load_profile_by_name(name))
            btn.grid(row=row, column=col, padx=2, pady=2, sticky="ew")
            _apply_direction(btn)
            col += 1
            if col >= 5:
                col = 0
                row += 1

    def _load_profile_by_name(self, profile_name):
        self.app.profile_name_var.set(profile_name)
        self.app.load_profile()



    def update_preview(self, manage_progress=True):
        """Aktualizuje podgląd pliku wejściowego, skalując go do rozmiaru płótna."""
        if self.preview_canvas is None:
            return

        if manage_progress:
            self.start_progress(self.preview_canvas, self.preview_progress)
        
        # Opóźnienie, aby dać czas na wyrenderowanie canvasu i uzyskanie jego prawidłowych wymiarów
        self.preview_canvas.after(100, self._update_preview_task, manage_progress)

    def _update_preview_task(self, manage_progress):
        """Zadanie właściwej aktualizacji podglądu, uruchamiane po ustabilizowaniu UI."""
        if self.preview_canvas is None:
            return
        canvas_w = self.preview_canvas.winfo_width()
        canvas_h = self.preview_canvas.winfo_height()

        if canvas_w < 2 or canvas_h < 2:
            if manage_progress:
                self.stop_progress(self.preview_canvas, self.preview_progress)
            self._show_message_on_canvas(self.preview_canvas, translate("msg_no_input_file"))
            return

        def task():
            try:
                path = self.app.file_path.get().strip()
                if not path or not os.path.exists(path):
                    if self.preview_canvas is not None:
                        self.preview_canvas.after(0, lambda: self._show_message_on_canvas(self.preview_canvas, translate("msg_no_input_file")))
                    return

                poppler_dir = get_poppler_path()
                # Generuj miniaturę o wymiarach pasujących do canvasu
                pages = convert_from_path(path, dpi=72, first_page=1, last_page=1, fmt='png', thread_count=4, size=(canvas_w, None), poppler_path=poppler_dir)
                if not pages:
                     raise ValueError("convert_from_path nie zwrócił żadnych stron.")
                img = pages[0]
                
                # Dodatkowe przeskalowanie, aby na pewno zmieścić się w pionie, zachowując proporcje
                img.thumbnail((canvas_w, canvas_h), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)

                self.preview_image = ImageTk.PhotoImage(img)
                if self.preview_canvas is not None:
                    self.preview_canvas.after(0, lambda: self._display_image_and_grid(img))

            except Exception as e:
                self.logger.error(f"Błąd podczas aktualizacji podglądu wejściowego: {e}", exc_info=True)
                if self.preview_canvas is not None:
                    self.preview_canvas.after(0, lambda: self._show_message_on_canvas(self.preview_canvas, translate("msg_thumbnail_error")))
            finally:
                if manage_progress and self.preview_canvas is not None:
                    self.preview_canvas.after(0, lambda: self.stop_progress(self.preview_canvas, self.preview_progress))

        threading.Thread(target=task, daemon=True).start()

    def _display_image_and_grid(self, img):
        """Wyświetla obraz i siatkę na płótnie podglądu wejściowego."""
        if self.preview_canvas is None:
            return
        self.preview_canvas.delete("all")
        canvas_w = self.preview_canvas.winfo_width()
        canvas_h = self.preview_canvas.winfo_height()
        self.preview_canvas.create_image(canvas_w / 2, canvas_h / 2, image=self.preview_image)

        try:
            rows, cols = int(self.app.rows.get()), int(self.app.cols.get())
        except ValueError:
            rows, cols = 1, 1

        img_w, img_h = img.width, img.height
        x_offset = (canvas_w - img_w) / 2
        y_offset = (canvas_h - img_h) / 2

        cell_w, cell_h = img_w / cols, img_h / rows
        for i in range(1, cols):
            x = x_offset + i * cell_w
            self.preview_canvas.create_line(x, y_offset, x, y_offset + img_h, fill="red", dash=(4, 2))
        for j in range(1, rows):
            y = y_offset + j * cell_h
            self.preview_canvas.create_line(x_offset, y, x_offset + img_w, y, fill="red", dash=(4, 2))

        for r in range(rows):
            for c in range(cols):
                lbl = chr(65 + r) + str(c + 1)
                x = x_offset + c * cell_w + cell_w / 2
                y = y_offset + r * cell_h + cell_h / 2
                self._draw_text_with_outline(self.preview_canvas, x, y, lbl, ("Helvetica", 12, "bold"), "white", "black", offset=1)

    def _show_message_on_canvas(self, canvas, message):
        """Wyświetla komunikat na środku danego płótna."""
        canvas.delete("all")
        canvas_w = canvas.winfo_width()
        canvas_h = canvas.winfo_height()
        canvas.create_text(
            canvas_w / 2, canvas_h / 2,
            text=message, fill="gray", font=("Helvetica", 14), justify="center"
        )







    def _update_widget_labels(self):
        """Aktualizuje tekst na wszystkich zapisanych widgetach, które tego wymagają."""
        for widget, key in self.translatable_widgets:
            try:
                if widget.winfo_exists():
                    # Specjalna obsługa dla LabelFrame
                    if isinstance(widget, ttk.LabelFrame):
                        widget.configure(text=" " + translate(key) + " ")
                    else:
                        widget.configure(text=translate(key))
                    _apply_direction(widget)
            except Exception as e:
                logger.warning(f"Nie udało się zaktualizować widgetu dla klucza '{key}': {e}")

    def update_combobox_values(self):
        """Aktualizuje listy wartości w comboboxach po zmianie języka (dynamiczne tłumaczenie)."""
        self._update_widget_labels()

        if 'layout' in self.comboboxes:
            self.comboboxes['layout']['values'] = [translate("layout_vertical"), translate("layout_horizontal")]
            try:
                idx = ["layout_vertical", "layout_horizontal"].index(self.app.layout.get())
            except ValueError:
                idx = 0
            self.comboboxes['layout'].current(idx)
            _apply_direction(self.comboboxes['layout'])
        if 'output_type' in self.comboboxes:
            self.comboboxes['output_type']['values'] = [translate("output_common_sheet"), translate("output_separate_files"), translate("output_both")]
            try:
                idx = ["output_common_sheet", "output_separate_files", "output_both"].index(self.app.output_type.get())
            except ValueError:
                idx = 0
            self.comboboxes['output_type'].current(idx)
            _apply_direction(self.comboboxes['output_type'])
        if 'reg_mark' in self.comboboxes:
            self.comboboxes['reg_mark']['values'] = [translate("reg_mark_cross"), translate("reg_mark_line")]
            try:
                idx = ["reg_mark_cross", "reg_mark_line"].index(self.app.reg_mark.get())
            except ValueError:
                idx = 0
            self.comboboxes['reg_mark'].current(idx)
            _apply_direction(self.comboboxes['reg_mark'])
        if 'barcode_type' in self.comboboxes:
            self.comboboxes['barcode_type']['values'] = [translate("code_qr"), translate("code_barcode")]
            try:
                idx = ["code_qr", "code_barcode"].index(self.app.barcode_type.get())
            except ValueError:
                idx = 0
            self.comboboxes['barcode_type'].current(idx)
            _apply_direction(self.comboboxes['barcode_type'])
        if 'bryt_order' in self.comboboxes:
            self.comboboxes['bryt_order']['values'] = [
                translate("bryt_order_1"),
                translate("bryt_order_2"),
                translate("bryt_order_3"),
                translate("bryt_order_4"),
                translate("bryt_order_5"),
                translate("bryt_order_6")
            ]
            try:
                idx = ["bryt_order_1", "bryt_order_2", "bryt_order_3", "bryt_order_4", "bryt_order_5", "bryt_order_6"].index(self.app.bryt_order.get())
            except ValueError:
                idx = 0
            self.comboboxes['bryt_order'].current(idx)
            _apply_direction(self.comboboxes['bryt_order'])

    def _create_recent_profile_buttons(self, container):
        """Tworzy guziki z ostatnio używanymi profilami (maksymalnie 10), ułożone w dwóch rzędach po 5."""
        for widget in container.winfo_children():
            widget.destroy()
        self.recent_profile_buttons = {}
        profiles = self.app.profile_list[:10]
        for idx, profile in enumerate(profiles):
            row = idx // 5
            col = idx % 5
            display_text = self._format_profile_name(profile)
            btn = tk.Button(container, text=display_text,
                            command=lambda p=profile: self.select_recent_profile(p),
                            wraplength=100, justify="center", relief="groove", bd=2, highlightthickness=2)
            btn.grid(row=row, column=col, padx=5, pady=5, sticky="nsew")
            container.columnconfigure(col, weight=1)
            self.recent_profile_buttons[profile] = btn
            _apply_direction(btn)
        self._update_recent_profile_buttons()

    def _format_profile_name(self, profile_name):
        """Formatuje nazwę profilu, dzieląc ją na dwie linie, jeśli jest długa."""
        if len(profile_name) > 12:
            mid = len(profile_name) // 2
            return profile_name[:mid] + "\n" + profile_name[mid:]
        return profile_name

    def select_recent_profile(self, profile):
        """
        Obsługuje kliknięcie guzika – ustawia wybrany profil jako aktywny 
        i natychmiast wczytuje jego ustawienia.
        """
        # Ustaw nazwę wybranego profilu w zmiennej i powiązanym polu combobox
        self.app.profile_name_var.set(profile)
        
        # Natychmiast wywołaj główną funkcję wczytującą profil
        self.app.load_profile()

    def _update_recent_profile_buttons(self):
        """Aktualizuje obrys guzików w zależności od aktywnego profilu."""
        active = self.app.profile_name_var.get()
        for profile, btn in self.recent_profile_buttons.items():
            if profile == active:
                btn.config(highlightbackground="green", highlightcolor="green")
            else:
                btn.config(highlightbackground="blue", highlightcolor="blue")


    def _draw_text_with_outline(self, canvas, x, y, text, font, fill, outline, offset=1):
        for dx in (-offset, 0, offset):
            for dy in (-offset, 0, offset):
                if dx == 0 and dy == 0:
                    continue
                canvas.create_text(x+dx, y+dy, text=text, font=font, fill=outline)
        canvas.create_text(x, y, text=text, font=font, fill=fill)

    def _show_preview_error(self):
        """Wyświetla komunikat o błędzie na canvasie podglądu wyjściowego."""
        if self.output_preview_canvas is not None:
            self.output_preview_canvas.delete("all")
            self.output_preview_canvas.create_text(
                OUTPUT_PREVIEW_CANVAS_SIZE / 2,
                OUTPUT_PREVIEW_CANVAS_SIZE / 2,
                text=translate("msg_thumbnail_error"),
                fill="gray",
                font=("Helvetica", 14),
                justify="center"
            )



    def _update_canvas_image(self):
        """Rysuje wczytany obraz podglądu WYJŚCIA na canvasie."""
        if self.output_preview_canvas is not None and self.output_preview_image is not None:
            self.output_preview_canvas.delete("all")
            w = max(2, int(self.output_preview_canvas.winfo_width() or 0))
            h = max(2, int(self.output_preview_canvas.winfo_height() or 0))
            self.output_preview_canvas.create_image(w/2, h/2, image=self.output_preview_image)

    from pathlib import Path



    def _select_output_preview_file(self, result_paths: dict) -> str | None:
        """
        Strategia wyboru pliku do podglądu WYJŚCIA na podstawie słownika z wynikami.
        """
        if not result_paths:
            return None

        preferred = result_paths.get("preview_preferred")
        if preferred and os.path.isfile(preferred):
            self.logger.debug(f"Output preview: using preferred path: {preferred}")
            return preferred

        mode = result_paths.get("mode")
        common_path = result_paths.get("common_sheet_path")
        if mode in ("output_common_sheet", "output_both") and common_path and os.path.isfile(common_path):
            self.logger.debug(f"Output preview: using common_sheet_path: {common_path}")
            return common_path

        separate_files = result_paths.get("separate_files", [])
        if mode == "output_separate_files" and separate_files:
            first_file = separate_files[0]
            if os.path.isfile(first_file):
                self.logger.debug(f"Output preview: using separate_files[0]: {first_file}")
                return first_file
        
        self.logger.warning("Could not select a suitable output file for preview.")
        return None




    def _clear_output_preview_canvas(self):
        """Czyści WYŁĄCZNIE canvas podglądu WYJŚCIA (nie tyka wejściowego!)."""
        if self.output_preview_canvas is not None:
            self.output_preview_canvas.delete("all")

    def _clear_input_preview_canvas(self):
        """Czyści WYŁĄCZNIE canvas podglądu WEJŚCIA (używane tylko tam, gdzie trzeba)."""
        if self.preview_canvas is not None:
            self.preview_canvas.delete("all")

    def _show_output_preview_message(self, message: str):
        """Wyświetla komunikat tekstowy na canvasie podglądu WYJŚCIA."""
        c = self.output_preview_canvas
        if not c:
            return
        try:
            c.delete("all")
            w = max(2, int(c.winfo_width() or 0))
            h = max(2, int(c.winfo_height() or 0))
            c.create_text(w // 2, h // 2, text=message, fill="gray",
                        font=("Helvetica", 12), anchor="center", justify="center")
        except Exception:
            # komunikat pomocniczy jest "best effort"
            pass



    def update_output_preview(self, result_paths: dict | None = None, manage_progress: bool = True):
        """
        Główna metoda uruchamiająca aktualizację podglądu wyjścia.
        Pobiera słownik z wynikami i zleca renderowanie miniatury.
        """
        if self.output_preview_canvas is None:
            self.logger.debug("Output preview canvas is not available, skipping update.")
            return

        if manage_progress:
            self.start_progress(self.output_preview_canvas, self.output_preview_progress)

        def _task():
            try:
                # Użyj przekazanych ścieżek lub pobierz ostatnie z instancji aplikacji
                paths = result_paths or getattr(self.app, "_last_result_paths", None)
                if not paths:
                    self.logger.debug("update_output_preview: No result paths available, clearing preview.")
                    self._show_output_preview_message(translate("msg_no_pdf_output"))
                    return

                # Wybierz jeden plik do wyświetlenia
                file_to_preview = self._select_output_preview_file(paths)

                if file_to_preview:
                    self._generate_preview_from_output([file_to_preview])
                else:
                    self.logger.warning("No output file selected for preview.")
                    self._show_output_preview_message(translate("msg_no_pdf_output"))
            finally:
                if manage_progress:
                    self.stop_progress(self.output_preview_canvas, self.output_preview_progress)

        self.output_preview_canvas.after(120, _task)




    def _pick_files_for_output_preview(self) -> list[str]:
        """
        Zwraca listę ścieżek plików do podglądu WYJŚCIA.
        Zasady:
        - output_common_sheet: 1 plik – wspólny arkusz
        - output_separate_files: do 9 pierwszych pociętych brytów (sortowane alfanumerycznie)
        - output_both: ZAWSZE podgląd po wspólnym arkuszu
        """
        import os, glob

        output_dir = (self.app.output_dir.get() or "").strip()
        if not output_dir:
            self.logger.debug("Output dir pusty – brak plików do podglądu.")
            return []

        # normalizacja ścieżki (eliminuje mieszanie slash/backslash)
        output_dir = os.path.normpath(output_dir)

        output_type = getattr(self, "output_type_var", None)
        output_type = output_type.get() if output_type else getattr(self, "output_type", "output_common_sheet")

        layout_var = getattr(self, "layout_var", None)
        layout = layout_var.get() if layout_var else getattr(self, "layout", "layout_vertical")
        lay_char = "v" if layout == "layout_vertical" else "h"

        base_name = (self.app.order_base_name_var.get() or "").strip()  # np. "billboard3"
        if not base_name:
            # jeśli nie mamy nazwy zamówienia, spróbuj wykryć jedyny wspólny arkusz w katalogu
            pattern_auto = os.path.join(output_dir, f"*_{lay_char}_separated.pdf")
            candidates = sorted(glob.glob(pattern_auto))
            if output_type in ("output_common_sheet", "output_both"):
                if candidates:
                    self.logger.debug(f"Auto-detekcja wspólnego arkusza: {candidates[0]}")
                    return [candidates[0]]
            # dla osobnych spróbujmy zebrać *.pdf
            pattern_sep = os.path.join(output_dir, f"*_*_{lay_char}.pdf")
            files = sorted(glob.glob(pattern_sep))[:9]
            return files

        # Nazwa pliku wspólnego arkusza wg konwencji z logów:
        #   {base_name}_{v|h}_separated.pdf  (np. billboard3_v_separated.pdf)
        common_sheet_path = os.path.normpath(os.path.join(output_dir, f"{base_name}_{lay_char}_separated.pdf"))

        if output_type == "output_common_sheet":
            if os.path.isfile(common_sheet_path):
                return [common_sheet_path]
            else:
                self.logger.debug(f"Brak wspólnego arkusza pod: {common_sheet_path}")
                return []

        if output_type == "output_both":
            # zawsze pokazuj wspólny arkusz jako miniaturę
            if os.path.isfile(common_sheet_path):
                return [common_sheet_path]
            else:
                self.logger.debug(f"Brak wspólnego arkusza (output_both) pod: {common_sheet_path}")
                return []

        # output_separate_files
        # Przykładowe nazwy z logów: 0A01_0A01_h.pdf, 0B05_0B05_v.pdf, ...
        pattern = os.path.join(output_dir, f"*_*_{lay_char}.pdf")
        files = sorted(glob.glob(pattern))[:9]
        if not files:
            self.logger.debug(f"Nie znaleziono osobnych plików wg wzorca: {pattern}")
        return files




    def _open_pdf_first_page_png(self, pdf_path: str, width_px: int, height_px: int):
        """
        Renderuje 1. stronę PDF do obrazu (Pillow) o mniej więcej zadanym rozmiarze.
        """
        import os, math
        from pdf2image import convert_from_path

        pdf_path = os.path.normpath(pdf_path)

        if not os.path.isfile(pdf_path):
            self.logger.debug(f"PDF nie istnieje: {pdf_path}")
            return None

        # dobranie DPI tak, aby szerokość ~ width_px (z zachowaniem proporcji)
        # najpierw szybki render niskim dpi, żeby poznać proporcje
        poppler_dir = get_poppler_path()
        pages_lo = convert_from_path(pdf_path, dpi=36, first_page=1, last_page=1, fmt='png',
                                    poppler_path=poppler_dir)
        if not pages_lo:
            return None

        w0, h0 = pages_lo[0].width, pages_lo[0].height
        if w0 <= 0 or h0 <= 0:
            return None

        scale = width_px / float(w0)
        dpi = max(36, min(220, int(36 * scale)))  # bezpieczny zakres dpi

        pages = convert_from_path(pdf_path, dpi=dpi, first_page=1, last_page=1, fmt='png',
                                poppler_path=poppler_dir)
        if not pages:
            return None

        img = pages[0]
        img.thumbnail((width_px, height_px))
        return img




    def _render_output_preview_bitmap(self, files: list[str]):
        """
        Buduje obrazek do podglądu:
        - 1 plik → render 1. strony PDF
        - >=2 pliki → mozaika 3×3 z pierwszych 9 PDF-ów (1. strony)
        """
        from PIL import Image

        if not files:
            return None

        # docelowy rozmiar „roboczy” – i tak potem thumbnail do canvasa
        max_w = max_h = 900

        try:
            if len(files) == 1:
                return self._open_pdf_first_page_png(files[0], max_w, max_h)
            else:
                cols = rows = 3
                cell = 280
                spacing = 16
                W = cols * cell + (cols - 1) * spacing
                H = rows * cell + (rows - 1) * spacing
                canvas = Image.new("RGB", (W, H), "white")

                i = 0
                for r in range(rows):
                    for c in range(cols):
                        if i >= len(files):
                            break
                        try:
                            im = self._open_pdf_first_page_png(files[i], cell, cell)
                            if im is not None:
                                # środek komórki
                                x = c * (cell + spacing)
                                y = r * (cell + spacing)
                                im.thumbnail((cell, cell))
                                # centrowanie wewnątrz komórki
                                ox = x + (cell - im.width) // 2
                                oy = y + (cell - im.height) // 2
                                canvas.paste(im, (ox, oy))
                        except Exception as e:
                            self.logger.debug(f"Miniatura pominięta ({files[i]}): {e}")
                        i += 1
                return canvas
        except Exception as e:
            self.logger.error(f"Render bitmapy podglądu nie powiódł się: {e}", exc_info=True)
            return None



    def _update_output_preview_task(self, manage_progress: bool):
        """Właściwa logika renderu miniatury w wątku roboczym + bezpieczny powrót do GUI."""
        if self.output_preview_canvas is None:
            return

        canvas_w = max(20, int(self.output_preview_canvas.winfo_width() or 0))
        canvas_h = max(20, int(self.output_preview_canvas.winfo_height() or 0))

        # Wszystko w wątku roboczym (render PDF -> obraz)
        def worker():
            from PIL import Image, ImageTk
            try:
                layout = self.app.layout.get()
                output_type = self.app.output_type.get()
                output_dir = self.app.output_dir.get()

                # Prepare a dict as expected by _select_output_preview_file
                result_paths = {
                    "mode": output_type,
                    "common_sheet_path": None,  # You may fill this if you have the path
                    "separate_files": None,     # You may fill this if you have the list
                    "preview_preferred": None
                }
                pdf_path = self._select_output_preview_file(result_paths)
                if not pdf_path or not os.path.exists(pdf_path):
                    # nie czyścimy wejścia! tylko komunikat na wyjściowym
                    if self.output_preview_canvas is not None:
                        self.output_preview_canvas.after(0, lambda: self._show_output_preview_message(translate("msg_no_pdf_output")))
                    return

                # render 1. strony do pixmapy (pymupdf)
                try:
                    doc = fitz.open(str(pdf_path))
                    if not doc.page_count:
                        raise RuntimeError(f"PDF has no pages: {pdf_path}")
                    page = doc.load_page(0)
                    pix = page.get_pixmap(dpi=96)
                    img = Image.frombytes("RGB", (pix.width, pix.height), pix.samples)
                    doc.close()
                except Exception as e:
                    self.logger.error(f"Output preview render failed for '{pdf_path}': {e}", exc_info=True)
                    if self.output_preview_canvas is not None:
                        self.output_preview_canvas.after(0, lambda: self._show_output_preview_message(translate("msg_thumbnail_error")))
                    return

                # skalowanie do rozmiaru canvasa
                img.thumbnail((canvas_w - 10, canvas_h - 10), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
                self.output_preview_image = ImageTk.PhotoImage(img)

                # malowanie w GUI
                if self.output_preview_canvas is not None:
                    self.output_preview_canvas.after(0, self._update_canvas_image)

            finally:
                if manage_progress and self.output_preview_canvas is not None:
                    self.output_preview_canvas.after(0, lambda: self.stop_progress(self.output_preview_canvas, self.output_preview_progress))

        threading.Thread(target=worker, daemon=True).start()

    
    
    def _create_composite_preview_grid(self, files: list[str]) -> Image.Image:
        """
        (Opcjonalny helper) Siatka miniaturek dla wielu PDF-ów.
        Nie jest używany dla 'output_both' (tam zawsze wspólny arkusz), ale zostawiamy na przyszłość.
        """
        if not files:
            return Image.new("RGB", (1, 1), "white")

        thumbs = []
        max_thumb_dim = 110
        spacing = 6

        # Wczytanie miniatur
        for p in files[:9]:  # max 3x3
            try:
                doc = fitz.open(p)
                if doc.page_count:
                    pix = doc.load_page(0).get_pixmap(dpi=40)
                    img = Image.frombytes("RGB", (pix.width, pix.height), pix.samples)
                    img.thumbnail((max_thumb_dim, max_thumb_dim), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
                    thumbs.append(img)
                doc.close()
            except Exception as e:
                self.logger.debug(f"Thumbnail skip ({p}): {e}")

        if not thumbs:
            return Image.new("RGB", (1, 1), "white")

        # Układ 3x3
        cols = rows = 3
        cell = max_thumb_dim
        W = cols * cell + (cols - 1) * spacing
        H = rows * cell + (rows - 1) * spacing
        canvas = Image.new("RGB", (W, H), "white")

        i = 0
        for r in range(rows):
            for c in range(cols):
                if i >= len(thumbs):
                    break
                x = c * (cell + spacing)
                y = r * (cell + spacing)
                # wycentruj w komórce
                tw, th = thumbs[i].size
                ox = x + (cell - tw) // 2
                oy = y + (cell - th) // 2
                canvas.paste(thumbs[i], (ox, oy))
                i += 1

        return canvas
    
    
    
    def _generate_preview_from_output(self, files: list[str], manage_progress: bool = False):
        """
        Renderuje miniaturę pierwszej strony podanego pliku (files[0]) na canvasie wyjścia.
        """
        if not files or not files[0]:
            self.logger.warning("generate_preview_from_output: No file path provided.")
            self._show_output_preview_message(translate("msg_no_pdf_output"))
            return

        pdf_path = files[0]
        canvas = self.output_preview_canvas
        if not canvas:
            return

        canvas_w = canvas.winfo_width()
        canvas_h = canvas.winfo_height()

        if canvas_w <= 2 or canvas_h <= 2:
            canvas.after(120, lambda: self._generate_preview_from_output(files, manage_progress))
            return

        def _render_task():
            try:
                self.logger.debug(f"Rendering output preview for: {pdf_path}")
                doc = fitz.open(pdf_path)
                if not doc.page_count:
                    raise ValueError(f"PDF file has no pages: {pdf_path}")
                
                page = doc.load_page(0)
                pix = page.get_pixmap(dpi=96)
                img = Image.frombytes("RGB", [pix.width, pix.height], pix.samples)
                doc.close()

                img.thumbnail((canvas_w - 10, canvas_h - 10), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
                self.output_preview_image = ImageTk.PhotoImage(img)

                def _update_gui():
                    if self.output_preview_canvas:
                        self.output_preview_canvas.delete("all")
                        self.output_preview_canvas.create_image(
                            canvas_w / 2, canvas_h / 2, image=self.output_preview_image, anchor="center"
                        )
                
                canvas.after(0, _update_gui)

            except Exception as e:
                self.logger.error(f"Failed to render output preview for '{pdf_path}': {e}", exc_info=True)
                self._show_output_preview_message(translate("msg_thumbnail_error"))

        # Uruchom renderowanie w osobnym wątku, aby nie blokować GUI
        threading.Thread(target=_render_task, daemon=True).start()

    def _generate_and_display_preview(self, manage_progress):
        """Metoda pomocnicza do generowania szybkiego podglądu w tle."""
        def task():
            try:
                path = self.app.file_path.get().strip()
                if not path or not os.path.exists(path):
                    if self.output_preview_canvas is not None:
                        self.output_preview_canvas.after(0, lambda: self._show_message_on_canvas(self.output_preview_canvas, translate("msg_no_input_file")))
                    return

                current_settings = {
                    "split_rows": self.app.rows.get(), "split_cols": self.app.cols.get(),
                    "layout": self.app.layout.get(), "bryt_order": self.app.bryt_order.get(),
                    "slice_rotation": self.app.slice_rotation.get(), "overlap": self.app.overlap.get(),
                    "white_stripe": self.app.white_stripe.get(), "add_white_to_overlap": self.app.add_white_to_overlap.get()
                }

                preview_image = self.app.splitter.generate_fast_preview(path, current_settings)

                if preview_image:
                    if self.output_preview_canvas is not None:
                        canvas_w = self.output_preview_canvas.winfo_width()
                        canvas_h = self.output_preview_canvas.winfo_height()
                        if canvas_w < 2 or canvas_h < 2:
                            canvas_w = canvas_h = OUTPUT_PREVIEW_CANVAS_SIZE
                    else:
                        canvas_w = canvas_h = OUTPUT_PREVIEW_CANVAS_SIZE
                    
                    preview_image.thumbnail((canvas_w, canvas_h), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
                    self.output_preview_image = ImageTk.PhotoImage(preview_image)
                    
                    if self.output_preview_canvas is not None:
                        self.output_preview_canvas.after(0, self._update_canvas_image)
                else:
                    if self.output_preview_canvas is not None:
                        self.output_preview_canvas.after(0, self._show_preview_error)
            except Exception as e:
                self.logger.error(f"Błąd podczas generowania podglądu wyjściowego: {e}", exc_info=True)
                if self.output_preview_canvas is not None:
                    self.output_preview_canvas.after(0, self._show_preview_error)
            finally:
                if manage_progress and self.output_preview_canvas is not None:
                    self.output_preview_canvas.after(0, lambda: self.stop_progress(self.output_preview_canvas, self.output_preview_progress))

        threading.Thread(target=task, daemon=True).start()






    def _create_composite_preview(self, files: list) -> Image.Image:
        """Tworzy złożony obraz z miniatur wielu plików PDF."""
        thumbs = []
        max_thumb_dim = 100  # maksymalny rozmiar pojedynczej miniatury
        spacing = 5

        if not files:
            return Image.new("RGB", (1, 1), "white")

        # Generowanie miniatur wątkowo dla przyspieszenia (równoległe wczytywanie pierwszych stron)
        try:
            from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor
            max_workers = min(4, len(files))
            def load_thumb(file_path):
                try:
                    doc = fitz.open(file_path)
                    if doc.page_count > 0:
                        page = doc.load_page(0)
                        pix = page.get_pixmap(dpi=30)
                        img = Image.frombytes("RGB", (pix.width, pix.height), pix.samples)
                        doc.close()
                        img.thumbnail((max_thumb_dim, max_thumb_dim), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
                        return img
                except Exception as e:
                    self.app.logger.error(f"{translate('cannot_load_thumbnail')} {file_path}: {e}")
                return None

            with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=max_workers) as executor:
                futures = [executor.submit(load_thumb, path) for path in files]
                # Pobierz wyniki zachowując kolejność oryginalnej listy plików
                for future in futures:
                    img = future.result()
                    if img:
                        thumbs.append(img)
        except Exception as e:
            # W razie błędów wielowątkowości – powrót do przetwarzania sekwencyjnego
            self.app.logger.debug(f"Threaded thumbnail generation failed, falling back to sequential: {e}")
            thumbs = []
            for file_path in files:
                try:
                    doc = fitz.open(file_path)
                    if doc.page_count > 0:
                        page = doc.load_page(0)
                        pix = page.get_pixmap(dpi=30)
                        img = Image.frombytes("RGB", (pix.width, pix.height), pix.samples)
                        doc.close()
                        img.thumbnail((max_thumb_dim, max_thumb_dim), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
                        thumbs.append(img)
                except Exception as e2:
                    self.app.logger.error(f"{translate('cannot_load_thumbnail')} {file_path}: {e2}")

        if not thumbs:
            return Image.new("RGB", (1, 1), "white")

        # Ułożenie miniatur w jednym wierszu na wspólnym obrazie podglądu
        total_width = sum(img.width for img in thumbs) + spacing * (len(thumbs) - 1)
        max_height = max(img.height for img in thumbs)
        composite_img = Image.new("RGB", (total_width, max_height), "lightgrey")

        x_offset = 0
        for img in thumbs:
            y_offset = (max_height - img.height) // 2
            composite_img.paste(img, (x_offset, y_offset))
            x_offset += img.width + spacing

        return composite_img
           



# Plik: main_ui_settings.py
# main_ui_settings.py
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk, messagebox
from main_utils import _on_mousewheel, _apply_direction
import config
from lang_manager import translate, update_ui_language
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger('BillboardSplitter')

class SettingsTabUI:
    def __init__(self, parent_frame: ttk.Frame, app):
        """Inicjalizuje UI zakładki Ustawienia."""
        self.parent = parent_frame
        self.app = app
        self.logger = app.logger
        self.comboboxes = {}
        self.label_frames = {}
        self.graphic_vars = {}
        self.code_gui_vars = {}
        self.margin_labels = {}
        self.translatable_widgets = []
        self._setup_ui()

    def _setup_ui(self):
        """Tworzy zawartość zakładki 'Ustawienia'."""
        self.translatable_widgets = []

        settings_scroll_frame = ttk.Frame(self.parent)
        settings_scroll_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

        settings_canvas = tk.Canvas(settings_scroll_frame)
        settings_canvas.pack(side="left", fill="both", expand=True)
        settings_scrollbar = ttk.Scrollbar(settings_scroll_frame, orient="vertical", command=settings_canvas.yview)
        settings_scrollbar.pack(side="right", fill="y")
        settings_canvas.configure(yscrollcommand=settings_scrollbar.set)

        inner_settings_frame = ttk.Frame(settings_canvas, padding="10")
        settings_canvas.create_window((0, 0), window=inner_settings_frame, anchor="nw")

        inner_settings_frame.bind("<Configure>", lambda e: settings_canvas.configure(scrollregion=settings_canvas.bbox("all")))
        _on_mousewheel(settings_canvas)

        row_counter = 0
        
        processing_mode_key = "section_processing_mode"
        processing_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(inner_settings_frame, text=translate(processing_mode_key), padding="10")
        processing_frame.grid(row=row_counter, column=0, sticky="ew", padx=5, pady=(5, 10))
        self.translatable_widgets.append((processing_frame, processing_mode_key))
        _apply_direction(processing_frame)
        row_counter += 1
        
        rb1 = ttk.Radiobutton(processing_frame, text=translate("processing_mode_hdd"), variable=self.app.processing_mode, value="hdd")
        rb1.pack(side="left", padx=10)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((rb1, "processing_mode_hdd"))
        _apply_direction(rb1)

        rb2 = ttk.Radiobutton(processing_frame, text=translate("processing_mode_ram"), variable=self.app.processing_mode, value="ram")
        rb2.pack(side="left", padx=10)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((rb2, "processing_mode_ram"))
        _apply_direction(rb2)

        graphic_settings_key = "graphic_settings"
        graphic_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(inner_settings_frame, text=" " + translate(graphic_settings_key) + " ", padding="10")
        graphic_frame.grid(row=row_counter, column=0, sticky="ew", padx=5, pady=5)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((graphic_frame, graphic_settings_key))
        _apply_direction(graphic_frame)
        row_counter += 1
        graphic_frame.columnconfigure(1, weight=1)

        gf_fields = [
            ("margin_top_label", "margin_top", 2.0),
            ("margin_bottom_label", "margin_bottom", 2.0),
            ("margin_left_label", "margin_left", 2.0),
            ("margin_right_label", "margin_right", 2.0),
            ("reg_mark_width_label", "reg_mark_width", 5.0),
            ("reg_mark_height_label", "reg_mark_height", 5.0),
            ("reg_mark_white_line_width_label", "reg_mark_white_line_width", 0.5),
            ("reg_mark_black_line_width_label", "reg_mark_black_line_width", 0.7),
            ("sep_line_black_width_label", "sep_line_black_width", 0.5),
            ("sep_line_white_width_label", "sep_line_white_width", 0.3),
            ("slice_gap_label", "slice_gap", 2.0),
        ]
        
        g_row = 0
        for label_key, config_key, default_val in gf_fields:
            label = ttk.Label(graphic_frame, text=translate(label_key))
            label.grid(row=g_row, column=0, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
            self.translatable_widgets.append((label, label_key))
            _apply_direction(label)
            
            if config_key in ["margin_top", "margin_bottom", "margin_left", "margin_right"]:
                self.margin_labels[config_key] = label

            if config_key not in self.app.graphic_vars:
                self.app.graphic_vars[config_key] = tk.StringVar()
            var = self.app.graphic_vars[config_key]
            entry = ttk.Entry(graphic_frame, textvariable=var, width=10)
            entry.grid(row=g_row, column=1, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
            _apply_direction(entry)
            g_row += 1

        barcode_pos_frame = ttk.Frame(inner_settings_frame)
        barcode_pos_frame.grid(row=row_counter, column=0, sticky="ew", padx=5, pady=(5,0))
        
        label = ttk.Label(barcode_pos_frame, text=translate("barcode_text_position_label"))
        label.grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((label, "barcode_text_position_label"))
        _apply_direction(label)

        position_values = [translate("barcode_text_bottom"), translate("barcode_text_side"), translate("barcode_text_none")] 
        position_combo = ttk.Combobox(barcode_pos_frame, values=position_values, state="readonly", width=20) 
        _apply_direction(position_combo)
        
        try:
            pos_index = ["bottom", "side", "none"].index(self.app.barcode_text_position.get()) 
        except ValueError:
            pos_index = 1
        position_combo.current(pos_index) 
        position_combo.grid(row=0, column=1, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2) 

        def on_position_selected(event=None): 
            selected = position_combo.get() 
            key_map = {
                translate("barcode_text_bottom"): "bottom",
                translate("barcode_text_side"): "side",
                translate("barcode_text_none"): "none"
            }
            new_key = key_map.get(selected, "side")
            self.app.barcode_text_position.set(new_key) 
        position_combo.bind("<<ComboboxSelected>>", on_position_selected) 
        self.comboboxes['barcode_text_position'] = position_combo 
        row_counter += 1

        code_settings_key = "code_settings"
        code_settings_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(inner_settings_frame, text=" " + translate(code_settings_key) + " ", padding="10")
        code_settings_frame.grid(row=row_counter, column=0, sticky="ew", padx=5, pady=5)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((code_settings_frame, code_settings_key))
        _apply_direction(code_settings_frame)
        row_counter += 1

        code_params = {
            "code_qr": [("scale_label", "scale", 10.0)],
            "code_barcode": [("scale_x_label", "scale_x", 50.0), ("scale_y_label", "scale_y", 10.0)]
        }
        common_params = [
            ("offset_x_label", "offset_x", 0.0),
            ("offset_y_label", "offset_y", 0.0),
            ("rotation_label", "rotation", 0.0),
            ("anchor_label", "anchor", "bottom-left")
        ]
        anchor_values = ["bottom-left", "bottom-right", "top-left", "top-right", "center", "center-bottom", "center-top", "center-left", "center-right"]
        code_type_keys = ["code_qr", "code_barcode"]
        output_type_keys_internal = ["common_sheet", "separate_files"]
        layout_keys_internal = ["horizontal", "vertical"]

        for code_key in code_type_keys:
            code_type_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(code_settings_frame, text=f" {translate(code_key)} ", padding="5")
            code_type_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=5, pady=5)
            self.translatable_widgets.append((code_type_frame, code_key))
            _apply_direction(code_type_frame)

            if code_key not in self.app.code_gui_vars:
                self.app.code_gui_vars[code_key] = {}

            for output_key_internal in output_type_keys_internal:
                output_label_key = "output_common" if output_key_internal == "common_sheet" else "output_separate"
                output_type_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(code_type_frame, text=f" {translate(output_label_key)} ", padding="5")
                output_type_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=5, pady=5)
                self.translatable_widgets.append((output_type_frame, output_label_key))
                _apply_direction(output_type_frame)

                if output_key_internal not in self.app.code_gui_vars[code_key]:
                    self.app.code_gui_vars[code_key][output_key_internal] = {}

                for layout_key_internal in layout_keys_internal:
                    layout_label_key = "layout_" + layout_key_internal
                    layout_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(output_type_frame, text=f" {translate(layout_label_key)} ", padding="5")
                    layout_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=5, pady=5)
                    self.translatable_widgets.append((layout_frame, layout_label_key))
                    _apply_direction(layout_frame)

                    if layout_key_internal not in self.app.code_gui_vars[code_key][output_key_internal]:
                        self.app.code_gui_vars[code_key][output_key_internal][layout_key_internal] = {}

                    layout_frame.columnconfigure(1, weight=1)
                    l_row = 0
                    specific_params = code_params.get(code_key, [])
                    all_display_params = common_params + specific_params

                    for label_text_key, param_key, default_val in all_display_params:
                        if param_key not in self.app.code_gui_vars[code_key][output_key_internal][layout_key_internal]:
                            self.app.code_gui_vars[code_key][output_key_internal][layout_key_internal][param_key] = tk.StringVar()

                        var = self.app.code_gui_vars[code_key][output_key_internal][layout_key_internal][param_key]

                        label = ttk.Label(layout_frame, text=translate(label_text_key))
                        label.grid(row=l_row, column=0, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
                        self.translatable_widgets.append((label, label_text_key))
                        _apply_direction(label)

                        if param_key == "anchor":
                            anchor_combo = ttk.Combobox(layout_frame, textvariable=var, values=anchor_values, width=15, state="readonly")
                            anchor_combo.grid(row=l_row, column=1, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
                            _apply_direction(anchor_combo)
                            self.comboboxes[f"{code_key}_{output_key_internal}_{layout_key_internal}_anchor"] = anchor_combo
                        else:
                            entry = ttk.Entry(layout_frame, textvariable=var, width=10)
                            entry.grid(row=l_row, column=1, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
                            _apply_direction(entry)
                        l_row += 1

        logging_settings_key = "logging_settings"
        login_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(inner_settings_frame, text=" " + translate(logging_settings_key) + " ", padding="10")
        login_frame.grid(row=row_counter, column=0, sticky="ew", padx=5, pady=5)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((login_frame, logging_settings_key))
        _apply_direction(login_frame)
        row_counter += 1
        login_frame.columnconfigure(1, weight=1)
        l_row = 0
        
        label = ttk.Label(login_frame, text=translate("logging_mode_label"))
        label.grid(row=l_row, column=0, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((label, "logging_mode_label"))
        _apply_direction(label)
        logging_mode_values = [translate("logging_console"), translate("logging_file"), translate("logging_both")]
        logging_mode_combo = ttk.Combobox(login_frame, textvariable=self.app.logging_mode, values=logging_mode_values, width=10, state="readonly")
        logging_mode_combo.grid(row=l_row, column=1, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        _apply_direction(logging_mode_combo)
        self.comboboxes['logging_mode'] = logging_mode_combo
        l_row += 1

        label = ttk.Label(login_frame, text=translate("log_file_label"))
        label.grid(row=l_row, column=0, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((label, "log_file_label"))
        _apply_direction(label)
        log_entry = ttk.Entry(login_frame, textvariable=self.app.log_file_path, width=50)
        log_entry.grid(row=l_row, column=1, columnspan=2, sticky="ew", padx=5, pady=2)
        _apply_direction(log_entry)
        btn = ttk.Button(login_frame, text=translate("browse_folder"), command=self.app.browse_log_folder)
        btn.grid(row=l_row, column=3, padx=5)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((btn, "browse_folder"))
        _apply_direction(btn)
        l_row += 1

        label = ttk.Label(login_frame, text=translate("logging_level_label"))
        label.grid(row=l_row, column=0, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((label, "logging_level_label"))
        _apply_direction(label)
        logging_level_values = ["DEBUG", "INFO", "WARNING", "ERROR", "CRITICAL"]
        logging_level_combo = ttk.Combobox(login_frame, textvariable=self.app.logging_level, values=logging_level_values, width=10, state="readonly")
        logging_level_combo.grid(row=l_row, column=1, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        _apply_direction(logging_level_combo)
        self.comboboxes['logging_level'] = logging_level_combo
        l_row += 1

        language_switch_key = "language_switch"
        language_switch_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(inner_settings_frame, text=" " + translate(language_switch_key) + " ", padding="10")
        language_switch_frame.grid(row=row_counter, column=0, sticky="ew", padx=5, pady=5)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((language_switch_frame, language_switch_key))
        _apply_direction(language_switch_frame)
        row_counter += 1
        
        label = ttk.Label(language_switch_frame, text=translate("choose_language"))
        label.grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((label, "choose_language"))
        _apply_direction(label)
        self.language_var = tk.StringVar(value=config.settings.get("language", "pl"))
        language_options = [
            ("pl", "Polski"), 
            ("en", "English"), 
            ("ar", "العربية"),
            ("zn", "中文"),
            ("da", "Dansk"),
            ("de", "Deutsch"),
            ("es", "Español"),
            ("fr", "Français"),
            ("it", "Italiano"),
            ("nb", "Norsk Bokmål"),
            ("nl", "Nederlands"),
            ("pt", "Português"),
            ("ru", "Русский"),
            ("sv", "Svenska"),
            ("tr", "Türkçe"),
            ("uk", "Українська"),
            ("hu", "Magyar"),
            ("el", "Ελληνικά"),
            ("bg", "Български"),
            ("ro", "Română"),
            ("sr", "Srpski"),
            ("hr", "Hrvatski"),
            ("fi", "Suomi"),
            ("sk", "Slovenčina"),
            ("cs", "Čeština"),
            ("th", "ไทย"),
            ("fil", "Filipino"),
            ("km", "ខ្មែរ"),
            ("id", "Bahasa Indonesia"),
            ("ms", "Bahasa Melayu"),
            ("vi", "Tiếng Việt"),
            ("ja", "日本語"),
            ("ko", "한국어"),
            ("hi", "हिन्दी"),
            ("ur", "اردو")
        ]
        language_display_values = [option[1] for option in language_options]
        self.language_map = {display: code for code, display in language_options}
        self.reverse_language_map = {code: display for code, display in language_options}

        self.language_combo = ttk.Combobox(language_switch_frame, textvariable=self.language_var, values=language_display_values, state="readonly", width=10)
        _apply_direction(self.language_combo)

        initial_lang_code = self.language_var.get()
        display_value = self.reverse_language_map.get(initial_lang_code, language_display_values[0])
        self.language_combo.set(display_value)

        self.language_combo.grid(row=0, column=1, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.comboboxes['language'] = self.language_combo
        btn = ttk.Button(language_switch_frame, text=translate("apply_language"), command=self.apply_language)
        btn.grid(row=0, column=2, sticky="w", padx=5, pady=2)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((btn, "apply_language"))
        _apply_direction(btn)

        button_frame = ttk.Frame(inner_settings_frame)
        button_frame.grid(row=row_counter, column=0, sticky="ew", pady=10)
        btn1 = ttk.Button(button_frame, text=translate("button_generate_pdf"), command=self.app.generate_pdf)
        btn1.grid(row=0, column=0, padx=5)
        self.translatable_widgets.append((btn1, "button_generate_pdf"))
        _apply_direction(btn1)
        btn2 = ttk.Button(button_frame, text=translate("save_all_settings"), command=self.app.save_settings)
        btn2.grid(row=0, column=1, padx=5, sticky="e")
        self.translatable_widgets.append((btn2, "save_all_settings"))
        _apply_direction(btn2)

    def apply_language(self):
        """Zmienia język aplikacji i aktualizuje interfejs."""
        selected_display_name = self.language_combo.get()
        new_lang_code = self.language_map.get(selected_display_name, "pl")

        config.settings["language"] = new_lang_code
        from lang_manager import set_language, translate
        set_language(new_lang_code)

        update_ui_language(self.app)

        self.language_var.set(selected_display_name)

        # Re-apply direction for all widgets in this tab
        for widget, key in self.translatable_widgets:
            if widget.winfo_exists():
                _apply_direction(widget)
        for combo in self.comboboxes.values():
            if combo.winfo_exists():
                _apply_direction(combo)

        messagebox.showinfo(translate("language"), translate("language_changed"))
        self.logger.info(f"Zmieniono język na: {new_lang_code}")

    def save_and_apply_settings(self):
        """Zapisuje ustawienia i stosuje zmiany języka natychmiast."""
        settings_saved_successfully = self.app.save_settings()

        if settings_saved_successfully:
             current_lang_code_in_config = config.settings.get("language", "pl")
             selected_display_name = self.language_combo.get()
             selected_lang_code = self.language_map.get(selected_display_name, "pl")

             if current_lang_code_in_config != selected_lang_code:
                 self.apply_language()
             else:
                 self.app.update_gui_from_config()
                 self.update_combobox_values()

    def save_settings(self):
        """Zapisuje aktualne ustawienia, natychmiast je stosuje i informuje użytkownika."""
        self.logger.debug(translate("logger_start_save_settings"))
        if self.save_settings_local():
            try:
                import config
                config.save_settings("settings.json")
                self.logger.info(translate("logger_settings_saved").format(file="settings.json"))
                from tkinter import messagebox
                messagebox.showinfo(
                    translate("settings_saved_title"),
                    translate("settings_saved").format(filepath="settings.json")
                )

                self.app.splitter.config = config
                self.app.splitter.update_graphic_settings()
                self.app.update_gui_from_config()
                self.app.home_tab_instance.update_preview()
                self.app.home_tab_instance.update_output_preview()

            except Exception as e:
                self.logger.error(translate("logger_unexpected_save_error").format(error=e), exc_info=True)
                from tkinter import messagebox
                messagebox.showerror(
                    translate("settings_save_error_title"),
                    translate("settings_save_error").format(error=e)
                )
        else:
            self.logger.error(translate("logger_conversion_error").format(error="conversion_failed"))

    def save_settings_local(self) -> bool:
        """Pobiera wartości z GUI i aktualizuje globalny słownik config.settings."""
        self.logger.debug(translate("logger_start_save_settings"))
        try:
            config.settings["file_path"]                = self.app.file_path.get()
            config.settings["split_rows"]               = int(self.app.rows.get())
            config.settings["split_cols"]               = int(self.app.cols.get())
            config.settings["overlap"]                  = float(self.app.overlap.get())
            config.settings["white_stripe"]             = float(self.app.white_stripe.get())
            config.settings["add_white_to_overlap"]     = self.app.add_white_to_overlap.get()
            config.settings["layout"]                   = self.app.layout.get()
            config.settings["output_type"]              = self.app.output_type.get()
            config.settings["registration_mark_type"]   = self.app.reg_mark.get()
            config.settings["barcode_type"]             = self.app.barcode_type.get()
            config.settings["bryt_order"]               = self.app.bryt_order.get()
            config.settings["enable_reg_marks"]         = self.app.enable_reg_marks.get()
            config.settings["enable_barcode"]           = self.app.enable_barcode.get()
            config.settings["enable_separation_lines"]  = self.app.enable_separation_lines.get()
            config.settings["add_line_at_start"]        = self.app.add_line_at_start.get()
            config.settings["add_line_at_end"]          = self.app.add_line_at_end.get()
            config.settings["output_dir"]               = self.app.output_dir.get()
            config.settings["slice_rotation"]           = int(self.app.slice_rotation.get())
            config.settings["create_order_folder"]      = self.app.create_order_folder.get()
            config.settings["barcode_text_position"]    = self.app.barcode_text_position.get()
            config.settings["processing_mode"]          = self.app.processing_mode.get()

            if "graphic_settings" not in config.settings:
                config.settings["graphic_settings"] = {}
            for key, var in self.graphic_vars.items():
                try:
                    config.settings["graphic_settings"][key] = float(var.get())
                except ValueError:
                    config.settings["graphic_settings"][key] = 0.0
                    self.logger.warning(translate("logger_invalid_value").format(key=key))

            config.settings["logging_mode"]  = self.app.logging_mode.get()
            config.settings["log_file_path"] = self.app.log_file_path.get()
            config.settings["logging_level"] = self.app.logging_level.get()

            if "code_settings" not in config.settings["graphic_settings"]:
                config.settings["graphic_settings"]["code_settings"] = {}
            code_settings_target = config.settings["graphic_settings"]["code_settings"]

            for code_type, output_types in self.code_gui_vars.items():
                code_settings_target.setdefault(code_type, {})
                for out_key, layouts in output_types.items():
                    code_settings_target[code_type].setdefault(out_key, {})
                    for layout_key, params in layouts.items():
                        code_settings_target[code_type][out_key].setdefault(layout_key, {})
                        for param_key, var in params.items():
                            value = var.get()
                            target = code_settings_target[code_type][out_key][layout_key]
                            if param_key == "anchor":
                                target[param_key] = value
                            else:
                                try:
                                    target[param_key] = float(value)
                                except ValueError:
                                    target[param_key] = 0.0
                                    self.logger.warning(translate("logger_invalid_value").format(key=param_key))

            self.logger.debug(translate("logger_end_save_settings"))
            return True

        except ValueError as e:
            messagebox.showerror(
                translate("conversion_error_title"),
                translate("conversion_error").format(error=e)
            )
            self.logger.error(translate("logger_conversion_error").format(error=e))
            return False

        except Exception as e:
            messagebox.showerror(
                translate("settings_save_error_title"),
                translate("settings_save_error").format(error=e)
            )
            self.logger.error(translate("logger_unexpected_save_error").format(error=e), exc_info=True)
            return False

    def _update_widget_labels(self):
        """Aktualizuje tekst na wszystkich zapisanych widgetach, które tego wymagają."""
        for widget, key in self.translatable_widgets:
            try:
                if widget.winfo_exists():
                    if isinstance(widget, ttk.LabelFrame):
                        widget.configure(text=" " + translate(key) + " ")
                    else:
                        widget.configure(text=translate(key))
                    _apply_direction(widget)
            except Exception as e:
                logger.warning(f"Nie udało się zaktualizować widgetu dla klucza '{key}': {e}")

    def update_combobox_values(self):
        """Aktualizuje wartości w komboboxach i etykiety ramek po zmianie języka."""
        self._update_widget_labels()

        if 'logging_mode' in self.comboboxes:
            current_key = config.settings.get("logging_mode", "logging_console")
            new_values = [translate("logging_console"), translate("logging_file"), translate("logging_both")]
            self.comboboxes['logging_mode']['values'] = new_values
            self.comboboxes['logging_mode'].set(translate(current_key))
            _apply_direction(self.comboboxes['logging_mode'])

        if 'barcode_text_position' in self.comboboxes:
            current_key = self.app.barcode_text_position.get()
            new_values = [translate("barcode_text_bottom"), translate("barcode_text_side"), translate("barcode_text_none")]
            self.comboboxes['barcode_text_position']['values'] = new_values
            key_map = {
                "bottom": translate("barcode_text_bottom"),
                "side": translate("barcode_text_side"),
                "none": translate("barcode_text_none")
            }
            self.comboboxes['barcode_text_position'].set(key_map.get(current_key, translate("barcode_text_side")))
            _apply_direction(self.comboboxes['barcode_text_position'])
        
        self.logger.debug("Odświeżono wartości comboboxów i etykiety w zakładce Ustawienia.")

# Plik: main_utils.py
# main_utils.py
import os
import sys
import tkinter as tk
from lang_manager import translate
import logging

def get_base_dir():
    """Określa bazowy katalog aplikacji."""
    if getattr(sys, 'frozen', False):
        # Uruchomiono jako .exe (zamrożone przez PyInstaller)
        return sys._MEIPASS  # Używamy sys._MEIPASS, gdzie PyInstaller rozpakowuje zasoby
    else:
        # Uruchomiono jako skrypt .py
        return os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

def _on_mousewheel(widget: tk.Canvas):
    """
    Ustawia obsługę kółka myszy dla przewijania wskazanego widgetu Canvas.
    Dla Windows/macOS oraz Linux – rejestruje bindingi dla odpowiednich zdarzeń.
    """
    def _mousewheel(event):
        # Dla Windows i macOS (event.delta)
        if event.delta:
            widget.yview_scroll(int(-1 * (event.delta / 120)), "units")
        # Dla Linux (zdarzenia Button-4/5)
        elif event.num == 4:  # Scroll up
            widget.yview_scroll(-1, "units")
        elif event.num == 5:  # Scroll down
            widget.yview_scroll(1, "units")

    # Bind dla różnych platform
    widget.bind("<MouseWheel>", _mousewheel)
    widget.bind("<Button-4>", _mousewheel)
    widget.bind("<Button-5>", _mousewheel)

def _apply_direction(widget, *, for_multiline=False):
    try:
        from lang_manager import text_align, text_justify, is_rtl
        align = text_align()
        justify = text_justify()
        # ttk.Label/ttk.Button: anchor steruje położeniem w komórce; justify – wyrównanie tekstu wieloliniowego
        if hasattr(widget, "configure"):
            # anchor dla etykiet/ramek/przycisków
            if "anchor" in widget.configure():
                widget.configure(anchor="e" if is_rtl() else "w")
            # justify dla tekstu wieloliniowego
            if for_multiline and "justify" in widget.configure():
                widget.configure(justify=justify)
        # Entry/Text – ustaw kierunek logiczny poprzez justify/right-left
        if widget.winfo_class() in ("TEntry", "Entry"):
            if "justify" in widget.configure():
                widget.configure(justify="right" if is_rtl() else "left")
        # Combobox: wyrównanie tekstu
        if widget.winfo_class() in ("TCombobox",):
            if "justify" in widget.configure():
                widget.configure(justify="right" if is_rtl() else "left")
    except Exception as e:
        logger = logging.getLogger('BillboardSplitter')
        logger.debug(f"_apply_direction failed: {e}")

from lang_pl import LANG

# Definicja koloru PANTONE – używana do znaczników i linii
PANTONE_BLACK_C = CMYKColor(0.01, 0.01, 0.01, 1, spotName="PANTONE Black C")

class SplitPDF:
    def __init__(self, config_module):
        self.config = config_module
        self.logger = self.setup_logging()
        # Ustal, czy aktywny jest tryb trial:
        self.trial_mode = verify_license(logger=self.logger)
        if self.trial_mode:
            self.logger.info(LANG["log_trial_mode_active"])
        else:
            self.logger.info(LANG["log_trial_mode_inactive"])
        self.generated_output_files = []
        # Ustawienia podstawowe – inicjalizowane przed calculate_dimensions
        self.width = 0
        self.height = 0
        self.core_slice_width = 0
        self.core_slice_height = 0
        self.slice_width = 0
        self.slice_height = 0
        self.margin_top = 0
        self.margin_bottom = 0
        self.margin_left = 0
        self.margin_right = 0
        self.mark_width = 0
        self.mark_width = 0
        self.mark_height = 0
        self.overlap_value = 0
        self.effective_overlap = 0
        self.use_white_stripe = False
        self.white_stripe = 0
        self.current_layout = "horizontal"
        self.mm = mm
        try:
            graphic_settings = self.config.settings.get("graphic_settings", {})
            self.margin_top = graphic_settings.get("margin_top", 2.0) * mm
            self.margin_bottom = graphic_settings.get("margin_bottom", 2.0) * mm
            self.margin_left = graphic_settings.get("margin_left", 2.0) * mm
            self.margin_right = graphic_settings.get("margin_right", 2.0) * mm
            self.mark_width = graphic_settings.get("reg_mark_width", 5.0) * mm 
            self.mark_height = graphic_settings.get("reg_mark_height", 5.0) * mm 
            self.logger.debug(f"Marginesy ustawione na (G/D/L/P): {self.margin_top/mm}/{self.margin_bottom/mm}/{self.margin_left/mm}/{self.margin_right/mm} mm")
        except Exception as e:
            self.logger.error(LANG["log_graphic_settings_error"].format(e), exc_info=True) 
            self.margin_top = self.margin_bottom = self.margin_left = self.margin_right = 2.0 * mm
            self.mark_width = 5.0 * mm 
            self.mark_height = 5.0 * mm 
        # Inicjalizacja zmiennych do podglądu
    #     self._preview_cache = {}
    #     self._last_preview_settings = None

    #         self.logger.debug("Cache podglądów zostało wyczyszczone.")

    # def should_regenerate_preview(self, settings):

    def update_graphic_settings(self):
        """
        Przeładowuje ustawienia graficzne (marginesy, wymiary znaczników)
        na podstawie config.settings bez konieczności ponownego tworzenia obiektu.
        """
        try:
            gf = self.config.settings.get("graphic_settings", {})
            mm = self.mm
            self.margin_top    = gf.get("margin_top",    2.0) * mm
            self.margin_bottom = gf.get("margin_bottom", 2.0) * mm
            self.margin_left   = gf.get("margin_left",   2.0) * mm
            self.margin_right  = gf.get("margin_right",  2.0) * mm
            self.mark_width    = gf.get("reg_mark_width", 5.0) * mm
            self.mark_height   = gf.get("reg_mark_height",5.0) * mm
            self.logger.debug(
                f"Graphic settings reloaded (T/B/L/R mm): "
                f"{self.margin_top/mm:.1f}/{self.margin_bottom/mm:.1f}/"
                f"{self.margin_left/mm:.1f}/{self.margin_right/mm:.1f}"
            )
        except Exception as e:
            # W razie błędu zostaną zastosowane poprzednie wartości
            self.logger.error(LANG["log_graphic_settings_error"].format(e), exc_info=True)


    def setup_logging(self):
        logger = logging.getLogger('BillboardSplitter')
        logger.debug("DEBUG: === Rozpoczęcie setup_logging ===")
        logger.debug(f"DEBUG: Początkowa lista handlerów: {logger.handlers}")
        # Usuń istniejące handlery, aby uniknąć duplikatów
        removed_handlers = []
        for handler in logger.handlers[:]:  # WAŻNE: Iteracja po kopii listy
            logger.debug(f"DEBUG: Usuwam handler: {handler}")
            logger.removeHandler(handler)
            removed_handlers.append(str(handler))
        logger.propagate = False
        logger.debug(f"DEBUG: Usunięto handlery: {removed_handlers}")
        logger.debug(f"DEBUG: Aktualna lista handlerów po usunięciu: {logger.handlers}")
        file_handler_added = False

        try:
            log_level_str = self.config.settings.get("logging_level", "INFO").upper()
            log_level = getattr(logging, log_level_str, logging.INFO)
            logger.setLevel(log_level)
            logger.debug(f"DEBUG: Poziom logowania ustawiony na: {log_level_str} ({log_level})")
            formatter = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
